# `devices` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `Device`

```prisma
model Device {
  id           String    @id @default(uuid())
  userId       String
  deviceId     String    @unique
  deviceName   String?
  deviceType   String?
  platform     String?
  appVersion   String?
  isActive     Boolean   @default(true)
  isTrusted    Boolean   @default(false)
  lastSeenAt   DateTime  @default(now())
  // Notification System Fields
  fcmToken     String? // Firebase Cloud Messaging token for push notifications
  publicKey    String? // Optional public key for E2E encryption (TweetNaCl format)
  osType       String?
  osVersion    String?
  apnsToken    String?
  lastSyncedAt DateTime? @default(now())
  metadata     Json?
  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime  @updatedAt
  user         User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([userId, deviceId], name: "userId_deviceId")
  @@index([deviceId])
  @@index([isActive])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([fcmToken])
  @@index([userId, isActive]) // active device lookup for push notifications
  @@schema("public")
}
```
